body: Reminder: the deacon board meets this Sunday in the fellowship hall right after the morning service. Please bring your ministry reports.
subject: Deacon board meeting — Sunday after service

body: We still need volunteers to staff Saturday's outreach relief drive. Sign up at the welcome table or reply to this email.
subject: Outreach relief drive — volunteers needed

body: Here is the monthly building fund summary for the board. We are 62 percent toward the new roof goal. Praise God for your faithful giving.
subject: Building fund update — March

body: Order of service and announcements for this Sunday. Early service 8 AM, Sunday school 9:30 AM, main worship 11 AM.
subject: Sunday service schedule

body: Square totals from the church bake sale are reconciled. We raised $1,240 for the youth fund. Thank you, bakers.
subject: Bake sale reconciliation

body: Next steps for our 75th anniversary celebration in October. Committee meets Thursday to finalize the banquet program and guest speaker.
subject: 75th anniversary planning

body: This week's sick and shut-in visit assignments are attached. Please confirm your route and pick up communion kits from the office.
subject: Sick & shut-in visit list

body: Food pantry signup for next month is open. We need packers, drivers, and greeters. Please indicate your availability by Friday.
subject: Food pantry signup — next month

body: Men's breakfast and Bible study is this Saturday at 8 AM in the annex. Brother Tate will lead the lesson on stewardship.
subject: Men's breakfast & Bible study Saturday

body: Choir rehearsal is moved to Wednesday at 7 PM this week to prepare for Resurrection Sunday. Please be prompt so we can run the full set.
subject: Choir rehearsal moved to Wednesday

body: Please welcome our newest members who joined the right hand of fellowship last Sunday. New member orientation is next week after second service.
subject: Welcome our new members

body: Vacation Bible School planning kicks off this month. We need teachers, snack helpers, and craft leaders for the summer program.
subject: VBS planning has begun

body: The usher board schedule for the next quarter is attached. Please review your assigned Sundays and trade with a partner if you have a conflict.
subject: Usher board schedule — next quarter

body: The trustee report for the quarter is ready. It covers facilities, insurance renewal, and parking lot repaving estimates for the board to review.
subject: Quarterly trustee report

body: Youth ministry lock-in is being planned for spring. Parents, please sign the permission and medical forms and return them to Sister Coleman.
subject: Youth ministry lock-in — permission forms

body: Add Sister Edwards and Brother Greene to the prayer chain. Both are recovering from surgery. Please keep them lifted up this week.
subject: Prayer chain update

body: Communion setup volunteers are needed for first Sunday. Please arrive by 9:30 AM to prepare the elements and the table linens.
subject: Communion setup — first Sunday

body: Christmas Eve candlelight service plan is set for 7 PM. Choir, ushers, and greeters please confirm your roles for the evening.
subject: Christmas Eve service plan

body: Mortgage-burning celebration is being scheduled now that the building note is nearly paid. Trustees, please confirm the final payoff date.
subject: Mortgage-burning celebration planning

body: Year-end tithing reminder: please turn in your offering envelopes before December 31 so we can issue accurate giving statements.
subject: Year-end tithing reminder
